original_statement: how many private entries were there in this race?
mutated_statement: how many private things were there in this thing?
mutation_analysis: Noun generalization + Placeholder substitution: "entries" → "things" (specific countable items/participants → generic placeholder) | "race" → "thing" (specific event → generic placeholder)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中对表格行逐一计数并列举具体姓名（如pietro nicolotti等）以及直接给出“9 private entries”的结论，可见agent未提及问题模糊性或提出澄清。agent按自身理解把“entries”映射为表中标注为“private entry”的参赛者并直接计算数量，既没有提示不确定性也未询问用户意图。因此归入“无法意识到指令模糊”，因为其行为表现为在未识别或声明歧义的情况下直接给出确定答案。
